So, like a couple of days ago, I played it for the first time. I wanted to play this blade ball rip-off called "Rage ball," and when I got on, there were cheaters, obviously. Then, when I got into the match, I got kicked out, and I couldn't play. The moderators barely do anything, and the whole game is buggy.

I love the game concept. However I bought the hacker 2.0 bundle on the meta app and it didn’t give me the items or bones. Now I saw the reply for a different review and you said should be bought in-game but I bought it in the app before I saw that review. So what I’m saying if you/your team can see what you  can do please try and fix it. Thank you for your time.

When I first downloaded this game, the first thing I did, as you would do in gorilla tag or any other fan game, was trying to find the place where I could buy cosmetics. When I found the place where to buy cosmetics, I couldn’t even figure out how to buy them. Then I spent the next 30 minutes asking everybody in the lobby how to buy cosmetics and everybody just looked at me weird and then just walked away. Not just that, I join a survive the killer lobby, and there were a whole bunch of people being racist, and everybody was being super toxic. You might be thinking that “hey gorilla tag’s like that as well“ and you are right, but there’s not as much of it. I love VMT and he’s my favorite YouTuber, but this game just sucks. ￼

There are to many bundles and most of them are scams. They even added modes for rage ball but none for the actual good ones like knockout, or freeze tag, and plus, rage ball is getting all the bundles, so they should fix this
 by removing atleast 8 out of the 12 or 13 there is.
 Add more roles for mm please.

reviews.review_title: Fun game, but it copy’s without notice.
reviews.review_description: I have recently played this game and have been enjoying it. That doesn’t mean I can’t complain about the fact that almost EVERYTHING is copied off of penguin paradise. The menu to equip cosmetics go into codes hell even the shop screen is copied off of penguin paradise. All I’m asking is why did you copy and instead make your own ideas? And don’t defend the game when it comes to game modes. The game could do a revamp for a lot of things to be original but I know it won’t do that.

developer_response.body: Hey Bernardston! Myself (Fiizy) and the owner of Penguin Paradise (Sava) made this game and we wanted to put certain things that worked well inside of Penguin Paradise like the Mobile Menu and Shop Menu inside of Skelly! The game modes inside of Skelly are spin offs of what worked well in other games and some that have never done in VR like Knockout and Rage Ball!

reviews.review_description: This game has fun and  friendly gamemodes and a good community. Almost everyone follows rules, and there are awsome outfits. Really good choice for challenging, competitive, but friendly games

For some unknown reason the x-ray clown bundle was still out during Christmas and so I thought “oh cool a nice little bundle” so I bought it not knowing that I would NOT get it in the game. S to the devs of skelly please either let me have the bundle I bought or idk because I can’t refund it.

developer_response.body: Hey TVHead we are very sorry you never got your bundle! Some players have issues when buying the bundle from the website or mobile app. If you do not get your items within 3 days, Meta automatically refunds your purchase so do not worry! For the future if you would like something, we recommend to buy it in-game!

reviews.review_title: It’s alright but needs touch ups..
reviews.review_description: The game is cool but it’s honestly a cash grab. I always see people with things worth 20-25$, that much for a stupid skin is insane, and the cosmetics..don’t even get me started. The cheapest price of the cosmetics are literally 2000 bones. That’s an insane price for a cosmetic, I hate that the arms are so short because even if you had long arms, the game would still be barely playable because of how short they make your arms in this game this game is cool and all, but it’s also really bad and needs a lot of fixes because I’ve seen 32 bugs since I joined which was 25 hours ago it’s crazy that there’s so many bugs in the game..
